messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-572 — Epic priority reorder screen on the live Mini App console — move-up/move-down swaps priority in the epic's backlog YAML
What it solves: Working precedent to copy, not re-derive:
  - route + auth + atomic write: `handlePausedPagerExpediteRoute` in
    extension/src/bridge/bridgeServer.ts (BL-538)
  - screen shape for a phone-sized list with per-row actions:
    extension/src/bridge/pausedPagerUiHtml.ts
  - pure decision module besid…
BL-572 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-572" (or "reject BL-572 <reason>") to act.
